report.name: PENPRN_INSTANCE1_DA_CONTROL_PANEL

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_DOMAIN_TYPE, COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO||'-'||TO_CHAR( PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPL_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR'), PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID, DECODE(REG_INSURED.SEX, 'Α', 'του ασφαλισμένου ', 'Θ', 'της ασφαλισμένης ') DECODED_SEX, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME FULLNAME, REG_INSURED.FATHER_NAME, REG_INSURED.MOTHER_NAME, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE, REG_INSURED.amka_id, REG_INSURED.taxation_id, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_QC_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE;

dataItem.name: DECODED_SEX
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Reg Insured Sex Α Του Α

dataSource.name: Q_4
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), MAX(TO_DATE(30||'/'||nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000))), SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY='2' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE GROUP BY PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE,COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataItem.name: MAX_TO_DATE_30_nvl_MONTH_1_nv2
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max To Date 30 Nvl Month 1 Nv2

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( TO_DATE ( 30 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 1000 ) ) )

dataItem.name: MIN_TO_DATE_1_nvl_MONTH_12_nv3
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 1 Nvl Month 12 Nv3

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_5
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 2

dataSource.name: Q_6
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 1

dataSource.name: Q_7
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_NAME, REG_INSURED.AMKA_ID AMKA_WIFE, REG_INSURED.TAXATION_ID TAXATION_WIFE FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS,PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE!='00001' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE=PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE ORDER BY PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE

dataSource.name: Q_8
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' AMOUNT_DESCR, 1 AMOUNT, ' ' SUM_INDICATOR, ' ' CALCULATION_FLG FROM DUAL;

dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00070' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND
pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00113'

dataSource.name: Q_20
dataSource.select: SELECT com_pension_institutions.pension_inst_name FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, com_pension_institutions WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00070' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00010' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=com_pension_institutions.PENSION_INST_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_24
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_DESCR FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_DEATH_REASON WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00035' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00049' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_26
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00013'

dataSource.name: Q_27
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00014'

dataSource.name: Q_28
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.PAYMENT_END_DATE, PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, DECODE (PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.DEDUCT_FLG, NULL, 'ΠΛΗΡΗ', 'ΜΕΙΩΜΕΝΗ') FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_PRODUCTS, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QCPRODINS_QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID= PEN_ACCOUNT.INS_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.STATUS = '1' --AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO;

dataSource.name: Q_29
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT CHAR_COL1 INSURANCE_FROM, CHAR_COL2 INSURANCE_TO, NUM_COL1 INSURANCE_DAYS, CHAR_COL3 TRANS_DESCR, CHAR_COL4 DESCRIPTION, CHAR_COL5 DESCRIPTION, CHAR_COL6 PENSION_INST_CODE, CHAR_COL7 TRANS_TYPE FROM PEN_WEBFORMS_RG WHERE 1=1 AND :P_SID IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_COL3 IS NOT NULL AND SID=:P_SID AND RG_NAME = 'RG_NAME1' ; /*SELECT ' ' INSURANCE_FROM, ' ' INSURANCE_TO, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS, ' ' TRANS_DESCR, ' ' DESCRIPTION, ' 'DESCRIPTION2 FROM DUAL;*/

dataSource.name: Q_32
dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_33
dataSource.select: SELECT ' 'SPRE_CODE, ' 'SPRE_DESCR, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS_SPRE_FINAL FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_34
dataSource.select: SELECT SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL), MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(1||'/'||NVL(MONTH,1)||'/'||NVL(YEAR,1000)))) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL IS NOT NULL AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL!=0;

dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' HEAVY_PERIOD_DESCR, 1 HEAVY_DAYS_PER_PERIOD FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_36

dataSource.select:
/*SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code in ('00069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+);*/
SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code in ('01069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

dataSource.name: Q_18
dataSource.select:
/*SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.PERCENTAGE FROM TMP_dec_fact_types_instance,PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS WHERE TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00159' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.FORM_ID=:P_FORM_ID AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+)*/
SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM TMP_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00159' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.FORM_ID=:P_FORM_ID AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

dataSource.select: SELECT 1 FROM PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE, PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST, PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT, PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS WHERE PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.STATE='0'--ΜΗ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΤΙΚΟ AND PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.BUSSINESS_EVENT_GROUP='4'--ΑΝ ΠΡΟΚΕΙΤΑΙ ΓΙΑ ΠΡΟΣΑΥΞΗΣΗ Α.Α. AND PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.REQUIRE_PENSION_FLAG='0'--ΔΕΝ ΧΡΕΙΑΖΕΤΑΙ ΝΑ ΠΑΙΡΝΕΙ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗ AND PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BUSS_EVENT_CODE=PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.BUSS_EVENT_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE.BE_PER_QUAL_CATEGORY_CODE=PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT.BE_PER_QUAL_CATEGORY_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_PER_BE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE.QUALIF_TERM_PER_BE_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:p_insured_id AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_TYPE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_FLG ='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR ='1' ;

dataSource.name: Q_62
dataSource.select: SELECT 1 DAYS, ' ' INSURANCE_FROM, ' ' INSURANCE_TO, ' ' DESCRIPTION FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_51
dataSource.select: SELECT A.VALUE, A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE A WHERE A.title_code='00368' AND A.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND A.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND A.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND A.dec_fact_type_code IN ('00510','00511','00512','00513','00514') ORDER BY A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE

dataSource.name: Q_52
dataSource.select: SELECT A.HEAVY_BONUS_ORG, A.HEAVY_BONUS_IND FROM PEN_ACCOUNT A WHERE A.ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.USAGE_FLG='1'

dataSource.name: Q_54
dataSource.select: SELECT A.INSURANCE_CLASS, A.PERIOD_YEAR_FROM || '-' || A.PERIOD_YEAR_TO PERIOD, A.NOTICE_TOTAL_SALARY, A.NOTICE_TOTAL_DAYS, A.PERIOD_YEAR_TO FROM PEN_SUMMARIZATION_PER_INSURED A WHERE A.PROCESS_ID = :P_PROCESS_ID

dataSource.name: Q_55
dataSource.select: SELECT WORKING_INS_REDUCTION, WORK_INS_CHILD_INCR, DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', ' ΣΤΟΝ ΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ','Δ','ΣΤΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ/ΕΥΡΥΤΕΡΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ','Α','ΜΕ ΑΥΤΟΑΠΑΣΧΟΛΗΣΗ',WORK_INS_SECTOR), DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', ' 63 Ν.2676/99','Δ','8 Π. 14 Ν. 2592/98',WORK_INS_SECTOR), DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', 'ΣΤΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΠΟΥ ΥΠΕΡΒΑΙΝΕΙ ΤΑ 733,68 ΕΥΡΩ','Δ','ΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ',WORK_INS_SECTOR), Work_Ins_Sector SECTOR, Excess_Amount, Initial_Amount, Final_Amount, Children_Num, LIMIT_AMOUNT_FOR_EXCESS FROM PEN_ACCOUNT_WORKING_INFO WHERE Account_No = :P_Acc_Account_No;

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_ΣΤΟΝ_
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Work Ins Sector Ι Στον

dataDescriptor.expression: DECODE ( WORK_INS_SECTOR , 'Ι' , ' ΣΤΟΝ ΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ' , 'Δ' , 'ΣΤΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ/ΕΥΡΥΤΕΡΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ' , 'Α' , 'ΜΕ ΑΥΤΟΑΠΑΣΧΟΛΗΣΗ' , WORK_INS_SECTOR )

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_ΣΤΟ_Π
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Work Ins Sector Ι Στο Π

dataDescriptor.expression: DECODE ( WORK_INS_SECTOR , 'Ι' , 'ΣΤΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΠΟΥ ΥΠΕΡΒΑΙΝΕΙ ΤΑ 733,68 ΕΥΡΩ' , 'Δ' , 'ΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ' , WORK_INS_SECTOR )

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_63_Ν_
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Work Ins Sector Ι 63 Ν

dataDescriptor.expression: DECODE ( WORK_INS_SECTOR , 'Ι' , ' 63 Ν.2676/99' , 'Δ' , '8 Π. 14 Ν. 2592/98' , WORK_INS_SECTOR )

dataSource.name: Q_56
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT INDIRECT_ID, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME, REG_INSURED.NAME FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE='00003'

dataSource.name: Q_57
dataSource.select: select DEBT_ID, DEDUCTION_PENSION_FACTOR, DOSAGE_AMOUNT, TOTAL_DEDUCTION_AMMOUNT, b.descr, rownum num_debt from PEN_DEC_INSTANCE_DEBTS a, ppi_deduction_types b WHERE DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE= :p_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND DT_DECISION_YEAR= :p_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO and a.DEBT_ID=b.code(+) AND a.STATUS='1'

dataSource.name: Q_58
dataSource.select: SELECT AVERAGE_INCOME,TO_CHAR(MIN(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), TO_CHAR(MAX(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME,0)), TOTAL_YEARS, case when SUM(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0)) <> 0 then ((SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0))*25) /SUM(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) else 0 end INFLATED_2, case when SUM(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0)) <> 0 then ((SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0))*25)/SUM(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) else 0 end INFLATED_3, SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0)) INFLATED_1, POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, NVL(POSOSTO_ANAPL,0)+ NVL(ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB,0) , SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)), A.INSTITUTION_CODE ADAPOD_CODE_AYTOT FROM PEN_CALC_ADAPOD_RES_DA A WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.INSTITUTION_CODE = :INST_CODE_AYTOT AND AYTOT_DA_FLG = '1' GROUP BY AVERAGE_INCOME, TOTAL_YEARS, POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, A.INSTITUTION_CODE ;

dataItem.name: to_char_MIN_TO_date_MONTH_YEAR
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Min To Date Month Year

dataItem.name: to_char_MAX_TO_date_MONTH_YEAR
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Max To Date Month Year

dataSource.name: Q_59
dataSource.select: SELECT INITIAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, STAY_GREECE_YEARS, INSURANCE_YEARS, INS_YEARS_REDUCTION, STAY_GR_YEARS_REDUCTION, DECODE( DENOM_OMOGENON, 40, NULL, 'ΑΡΘ.73 Ν.4915/22)') OMOG_LAW, DENOM_OMOGENON, AGE_LIMIT_REDUCTION, FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, DISABIL_PENSION_REDUCTION, A.INSTITUTION_CODE ETHNIKI_INST_CODE FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RES_DA A WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.INSTITUTION_CODE = :INST_CODE_AYTOT AND AYTOT_DA_FLG = '1'

dataSource.name: Q_60
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT LABOR_ACCIDENT_FLG FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RES_DA A WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO

dataSource.name: Q_61
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT 1 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND TEXT NOT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' AND :p_application_efka_days = 1 UNION SELECT DISTINCT 2 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND :p_application_efka_days = 1 AND TEXT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' UNION SELECT DISTINCT 1 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE IS NULL AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR IS NULL AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO IS NULL AND TEXT NOT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' AND :p_application_efka_days = 0 UNION SELECT DISTINCT 2 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE IS NULL AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR IS NULL AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO IS NULL AND :p_application_efka_days = 0 AND TEXT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' ORDER BY 1,3

dataSource.name: Q_63
dataSource.select: SELECT FROM_WORKING_DATE,TO_WORKING_DATE FROM PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES, COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES WHERE PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE=PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.CVR_COVER_CODE='ΚΣΙ' AND PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE IN ('810','820','830','840');

dataSource.name: Q_64
dataSource.select: SELECT A.INSTITUTION_CODE INST_CODE_0075, B.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME INST_NAME_0075, TO_CHAR(MIN(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy') MIN_DATE_0075, TO_CHAR(MAX(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy') MAX_DATE_0075, COUNT(DISTINCT MONTH||'/'||YEAR) TOTAL_MM_0075, TOTAL_YEARS_0075, -- CHRYS 15/7/2022 AVERAGE_INCOME SYNTAXIMES_APODX_0075, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB TOTAL_PERC_KSB_0075, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB ADAPOD_PER_KSB_0075, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT ADAPOD_AMNT_0075, A.INSTITUTION_CODE_AYTOT INST_CODE_AYTOT_0075 FROM PEN_CALC_0075_RES_DA A, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION B WHERE AYTOT_DA_FLG = '1' AND A.ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.INSTITUTION_CODE_AYTOT = :INST_CODE_AYTOT AND A.INSTITUTION_CODE = B.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE GROUP BY ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, AVERAGE_INCOME , TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, A.INSTITUTION_CODE, B.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, A.INSTITUTION_CODE_AYTOT, TOTAL_YEARS_0075 -- CHRYS 15/7/2022

dataSource.name: Q_65
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT B.PEN_INST_CODE_TO INST_CODE_AYTOT, C.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME INST_NAME_AYTOT FROM PEN_ACCOUNT A, PEN_APPL_INSTITUTIONS_DA B, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION C WHERE A.ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.PAI_PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE AND A.PAI_PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR AND A.PAI_APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO AND B.PEN_INST_CODE_TO = C.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE AND B.STATUS = '1' AND B.AYTOTELES_FLG = '1' ; -- ΑΥΤΟΤΕΛΗΣ ΦΟΡΕΑΣ

dataSource.name: Q_66
dataSource.select: SELECT INITIAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, STAY_GREECE_YEARS, INSURANCE_YEARS, INS_YEARS_REDUCTION, STAY_GR_YEARS_REDUCTION, DECODE( DENOM_OMOGENON, 40, NULL, 'ΑΡΘ.73 Ν.4915/22)') OMOG_LAW, DENOM_OMOGENON, AGE_LIMIT_REDUCTION, FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, DISABIL_PENSION_REDUCTION FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RES_DA A WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND AYTOT_DA_FLG = '2'

dataSource.name: Q_67
dataSource.select: SELECT AVERAGE_INCOME,TO_CHAR(MIN(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), TO_CHAR(MAX(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME,0)), TOTAL_YEARS, case when SUM(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0)) <> 0 then ((SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0))*25) /SUM(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) else 0 end INFLATED_2, case when SUM(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0)) <> 0 then ((SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0))*25)/SUM(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) else 0 end INFLATED_3, SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0)) INFLATED_1, POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, NVL(POSOSTO_ANAPL,0)+ NVL(ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB,0) , SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)) FROM PEN_CALC_ADAPOD_RES_DA A WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND AYTOT_DA_FLG = '2' GROUP BY AVERAGE_INCOME, TOTAL_YEARS, POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB;

dataItem.name: TO_CHAR_MIN_TO_DATE_MONTH_YEA1
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Min To Date Month Yea1

dataItem.name: TO_CHAR_MAX_TO_DATE_MONTH_YEA1
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Max To Date Month Yea1

dataSource.name: Q_68
dataSource.select: SELECT A.INSTITUTION_CODE INST_CODE_0075_DA, B.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME INST_NAME_0075_DA, TO_CHAR(MIN(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy') MIN_DATE_0075_DA, TO_CHAR(MAX(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy') MAX_DATE_0075_DA, COUNT(DISTINCT MONTH||'/'||YEAR) TOTAL_MM_0075_DA, TOTAL_YEARS_0075, -- CHRYS 15/7/2022 AVERAGE_INCOME SYNTAXIMES_APODX_0075_DA, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB TOTAL_PERC_KSB_0075_DA, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB ADAPOD_PER_KSB_0075_DA, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT ADAPOD_AMNT_0075_DA FROM PEN_CALC_0075_RES_DA A, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION B WHERE AYTOT_DA_FLG = '2' AND A.ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.INSTITUTION_CODE = B.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE GROUP BY ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, AVERAGE_INCOME , TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, A.INSTITUTION_CODE, B.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, TOTAL_YEARS_0075 -- CHRYS 15/7/2022

dataSource.name: Q_69
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT sum(NUM_COL1) SUM_INSURANCE_DAYS, DECODE(NVL(B.DAYS_30_FLAG,'0') ,0, 25, 30) CALC_DAYS, DECODE(NVL(B.DAYS_30_FLAG,'0') ,0, '( / 25 )', '( / 30 )') CALC_DAYS_PROMPT FROM PEN_WEBFORMS_RG A, PEN_TRANS_TYPES B WHERE 1=1 AND :P_SID IS NOT NULL --AND CHAR_COL3 IS NOT NULL AND SID=:P_SID AND RG_NAME = 'RG_NAME1' and ( ( B.TRANSACTION_TYPE = A.CHAR_COL7 AND A.CHAR_COL7 IS NOT NULL ) OR ( B.TRANSACTION_DESCR = A.CHAR_COL3 AND A.CHAR_COL7 IS NULL ) ) group by NVL(B.DAYS_30_FLAG,'0') ;

dataSource.name: Q_70
dataSource.select: select a.pension_inst_code oga_pension_inst_code, b.pension_ika_inst_name oga_pension_ika_inst_name, a.kyria_other_inst_amount oga_kyria_other_inst_amount , a.inst_pension_income oga_inst_pension_income , a.ko_inst_amount oga_ko_inst_amount, a.mature_factor oga_mature_factor , a.autot_inst_amount oga_autot_inst_amount, -- a.inst_days/a.denominator oga_days_denominator , to_char(a.inst_days)||'/'||to_char(a.denominator) oga_days_denominator , a.best_part_amount oga_best_part_amount, A.INST_PRCN OGA_INST_PRCN from pen_oga_anal_amounts_da a, com_pension_ika_institution b where a.account_no = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and a.pension_inst_code != '00033' and a.pension_inst_code = b.pension_ika_inst_code --- AND RECORD_TYPE = '2' ---SPAP 22/08/2022 ΧΤΥΠΑΓΕ ΣΤΗΝ ΠΑΡΑΓΩΓΗ

dataSource.name: Q_71
dataSource.select: select sum(decode(a.cp_calculation_parameter_code, 'DAEBT', nvl(a.amount,0), 0)) oga_katab_ethniki, sum(decode(a.cp_calculation_parameter_code, 'DAABT', nvl(a.amount,0), 0)) oga_katab_adapod, sum(decode(a.cp_calculation_parameter_code, 'ODKAT', nvl(a.amount,0), 0)) oga_katab_katabalomeno, sum(decode(a.cp_calculation_parameter_code, 'ODPLF', nvl(a.amount,0), 0)) oga_katab_plafon, sum(decode(a.cp_calculation_parameter_code, 'ODKAT', nvl(a.amount,0), 0) - decode(a.cp_calculation_parameter_code, 'ODPLF', nvl(a.amount,0), 0)) oga_teliko_katabalomeno from pen_qt_per_be_cc_per_account a where 1=1 and a.acc_account_no = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and a.status = '1' ;

dataDescriptor.expression: sum ( decode ( a.cp_calculation_parameter_code , 'ODKAT' , nvl ( a.amount , 0 ) , 0 ) - decode ( a.cp_calculation_parameter_code , 'ODPLF' , nvl ( a.amount , 0 ) , 0 ) )

dataSource.name: Q_72
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE TRANS_TYPE_PREP_DAYS, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR TRANS_DESCR_PREP_DAYS, MIN(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE ,'810',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'820',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'830',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'840',FROM_WORKING_DATE,TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000),'MM/YYYY'))) MIN_PREP_DAYS, MAX(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE ,'810',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'820',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'830',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'840',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000),'MM/YYYY')))) MAX_PREP_DAYS, SUM(nvl(NOTICE_INSURANCE_DAYS,0)+nvl(NOTICE_INS_DAYS_INCR,0)) SUM_PREP_DAYS FROM PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES, COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES WHERE PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID =:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE AND COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE=PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE AND COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.CVR_COVER_CODE IN ('ΚΣΙ', 'ΚΣΝ') AND ( nvl(NOTICE_INSURANCE_DAYS,0) != 0 OR nvl(NOTICE_INS_DAYS_INCR,0) != 0) AND 1 = CASE WHEN ( ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA = :P_APPL_YEAR and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PARALLEL_FLG,'0') = '0' ) -- DIADOXIKI THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') = 2 -- AFORA PERIPTOSEIS SYGXWNEFTHENTWN APO OTHONH ATHANASIOU and PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COMMIT_FLG = 2 THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') = '2' and :P_HAS_PREPARE_PROTOCOLS = 0 and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE IS NULL and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR IS NULL and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO IS NULL -- AYTOMATOPOIHMENES/PISTOPOIHMENOI XVRIS PROTOCOLS THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') IN ('1','2','4','3','7') and :P_HAS_PREPARE_PROTOCOLS > 0 and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO -- AYTOMATOPOIHMENES/PISTOPOIHMENOI THEN 1 ELSE 0 END /*AND 1 = CASE ---διαδοχικη να εχει πρωτοκολλα ιδια με της αποφασης WHEN ( ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA = :P_APPL_YEAR and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PARALLEL_FLG,'0') = '0' ) THEN 1 ---οταν δεν ειναι διαδοχικη WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') = 2 THEN 1 WHEN ( ((PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE OR PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE IS NULL) AND (PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR OR PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR IS NULL) AND (PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO OR PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO IS NULL)) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END */ ---23/9/2024 ALLAGH GIA DIPLES HMERES KAI THA BAINOUN PANTA PROTOKOLLA ME SOURCE ORIGIN = 2 ENW STIS AUTO THA PAIZEI ME TIS ALLES TIMES GROUP BY PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataSource.name: Q_73
dataSource.select: SELECT T.SIGNATURE FROM PEN_DECISION_GOV_SIGNATURES T WHERE T.STATUS = '1'

dataSource.name: Q_74
dataSource.select: SELECT T.LOGO FROM PEN_REPORTS_EFKA_LOGO T WHERE T.STATUS = '1'

dataSource.name: Q_75
dataSource.select: select t.text_description FREE_TXT from PEN_REPORT_FREE_TEXTS t where 1=1 and t.status = 1 and t.text_type = '1' and t.product_code_dependency = 9 --αφορά σε κατηγορία σύνταξης 1-γήρατος/2-αναπηρίας/3-θανάτου/5-παραπληγικά/9-ολες οι κατηγορίες ;

textSegment.string: 2.Έχοντας υπόψη τα στοιχεία του φακέλου από τα οποία προκύπτουν τα εξής :
ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΤΙΚΑ ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ - ΧΡΟΝΟΙ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΓΙΑ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΣΗ
ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟΣ ΠΟΣΟΥ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΜΕ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΠΡΙΝ ΤΗΝ 13/05/2016
ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟΣ ΠΟΣΟΥ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΜΕ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΠΡΙΝ ΤΗΝ 13/05/2016
ΕΠΙΔΟΜΑ ΝΟΣΟΥ ΑΝΙΚ/ΤΑΣ αρθ.54 παρ. 1,3 ΠΔ 169/07 :
ΠΡΕΠΕΙ, ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΙΣ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘ.
ΤΟ ΔΕ ΕΠΙ ΠΛΕΟΝ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΠΡΟΣΑΥΞΗΣΗΣ ΤΕΚΝΩΝ ΑΝΕΡΧΕΤΑΙ ΣΕ
ΕΥΡΩ ΟΠΩΣ ΔΙΑΜΟΡΦΩΘΗΚΕ ΜΕ ΤΙΣ ΑΥΞΗΣΕΙΣ ΑΠΟ
ΑΝΑΣΤΕΛΛΟΥΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΚΑΤΑΒΟΛΗ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΑΠΟ
ΑΠΟ ΕΠΟΜΕΝΗΣ ΔΙΑΚΟΠΗΣ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑΣ Η ΤΗ ΣΥΜΠΛΗΡΩΣΗ ΤΟΥ 55ΟΥ ΕΤΟΥΣ ΤΗΣ ΗΛΙΚΙΑΣ, ΤΟ ΚΑΤΑΒΑΛΛΟΜΕΝΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΔΙΑΜΟΡΦΩΝΕΤΑΙ ΜΗΧΑΝΟΓΡΑΦΙΚΑ, ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΙΣΧΥΟΥΣΑ ΝΟΜΟΘΕΣΙΑ.

ΤΥΧΟΝ ΠΡΟΚΥΠΤΟΥΣΑ ΠΡΟΣΩΠΙΚΗ ΔΙΑΦΟΡΑ ΚΑΤ' ΕΦΑΡΜΟΓΗ ΤΗΣ ΠΑΡΑΓΡΑΦΟΥ 2 ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 94 ΤΟΥ Ν.4387/2016 ΘΑ ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΤΕΙ ΚΑΙ ΘΑ ΚΑΤΑΒΛΗΘΕΙ ΜΗΧΑΝΟΓΡΑΦΙΚΑ,ΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΠΡΩΤΗ ΚΑΤΑΒΟΛΗ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΥΠΟΚΕΙΜΕΝΗ ΣΕ ΟΛΕΣ ΤΙΣ ΝΟΜΙΜΕΣ ΚΡΑΤΗΣΕΙΣ.
ΕΠΕΙΔΗ Ο ΑΝΩΤΕΡΩ ΣΥΝΕΧΙΖΕΙ ΕΡΓΑΖΟΜΕΝΟΣ ΤΟ ΚΑΤΑΒΑΛΛΟΜΕΝΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ, ΜΕΙΩΝΕΤΑΙ ΚΑΤΑ
60%, ΒΑΣΕΙ ΤΩΝ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΩΝ ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 20 ΤΟΥ Ν.4387/2016.
ΑΝΑΣΤΕΛΛΟΥΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΚΑΤΑΒΟΛΗ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΛΟΓΩ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑΣ ΣΕ ΦΟΡΕΑ ΤΗΣ ΓΕΝΙΚΗΣ ΚΥΒΕΡΝΗΣΗΣ ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ
ΕΠΙΦΥΛΑΣΣΟΜΑΣΤΕ ΓΙΑ ΤΗΝ ΑΝΑΘΕΩΡΗΣΗ ΤΗΣ ΑΠΟΦΑΣΗΣ ΑΥΤΗΣ ΩΣ ΠΡΟΣ ΤΟΝ ΚΑΘΟΡΙΣΜΟ ΤΟΥ ΥΨΟΥΣ:
1.ΤΗΣ ΑΝΤΑΠΟΔΟΤΙΚΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΟ ΔΕΥΤΕΡΟ ΕΔΑΦΙΟ ΤΗΣ ΠΑΡ. 1 ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 30 ΤΟΥ Ν. 4387/2016, ΓΙΑ ΔΙΑΣΤΗΜΑ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΕΩΣ 31.12.2001.
Σε περίπτωση που εξακολουθείτε εργαζόμενος μετά την έναρξη της συνταξιοδότησης και ο εργοδότης σας ανήκει
στον ευρύτερο Δημόσιο τομέα υποχρεούστε να προσκομίσετε άμεσα την απόφαση συνταξιοδότησης στον
ΣΕ ΠΕΡΙΠΤΩΣΗ ΠΟΥ ΧΟΡΗΓΗΘΗΚΑΝ ΠΟΣΑ ΠΡΟΣΩΡΙΝΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ, ΘΑ ΓΙΝΕΙ ΣΥΜΨΗΦΙΣΜΟΣ ΜΕ ΤΑ ΠΟΣΑ ΠΟΥ ΘΑ ΧΟΡΗΓΗΘΟΥΝ ΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΠΑΡΟΥΣΑ ΑΠΟΦΑΣΗ
Σε περίπτωση που εξακολουθείτε εργαζόμενος μετά την έναρξη της συνταξιοδότησης και ο εργοδότης σας ανήκει στον ευρύτερο
Δημόσιο τομέα υποχρεούστε να προσκομίσετε άμεσα την απόφαση συνταξιοδότησης στον εργοδότη σας.
